predicate_mappings.assigned_to_care_area: {} is assigned to the care area {}
predicate_mappings.treatment_room_compatible_secondary: {} is compatible with the secondary treatment room {}

register_patient_arrival.description: register the arrival of a patient A
preconditions: I can only register the arrival of a patient A if it is not the case that A is registered as a patient and it is not the case that the disposition is finalized for A
effects: Once I register the arrival of a patient A, it is the case that A is registered as a patient

assign_triage_staff.description: assign a triage staff B to a patient A for triage
preconditions: I can only assign a triage staff B to a patient A for triage if it is the case that A is registered as a patient and B is available for triage and B is compatible with A for triage
I can only assign a triage staff B to a patient A for triage if it is not the case that triage is in progress for A
effects: Once I assign a triage staff B to a patient A for triage, it is the case that A is assigned to triage staff B and triage is in progress for A
Once I assign a triage staff B to a patient A for triage, it is not the case anymore that B is available for triage

unassign_triage_staff.description: unassign a triage staff B from a patient A after triage completion
preconditions: I can only unassign a triage staff B from a patient A after triage completion if it is the case that A is assigned to triage staff B
I can only unassign a triage staff B from a patient A after triage completion if it is not the case that A is in treatment and it is not the case that safety checks are completed for A
effects: Once I unassign a triage staff B from a patient A after triage completion, it is the case that B is available for triage

Once I unassign a triage staff B from a patient A after triage completion, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to triage staff B and it is not the case anymore that triage is in progress for A and it is not the case anymore that triage assessment is complete for A and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for care assignment and it is not the case anymore that A has a priority flag and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for bed assignment and it is not the case anymore that escalation is required for A

allocate_stretcher_to_patient.description: allocate a stretcher B to a patient A
preconditions: I can only allocate a stretcher B to a patient A if it is the case that A is registered as a patient and B is available
effects: Once I allocate a stretcher B to a patient A, it is the case that A is assigned to B
Once I allocate a stretcher B to a patient A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_stretcher_from_patient.description: release a stretcher B from a patient A
preconditions: I can only release a stretcher B from a patient A if it is the case that A is assigned to B
effects: Once I release a stretcher B from a patient A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a stretcher B from a patient A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to B

confirm_triage_assessment_with_stretcher.description: confirm triage assessment for a patient A with a stretcher B
preconditions: I can only confirm triage assessment for a patient A with a stretcher B if it is the case that A is registered as a patient and triage is in progress for A and A is assigned to B
I can only confirm triage assessment for a patient A with a stretcher B if it is not the case that triage assessment is complete for A
effects: Once I confirm triage assessment for a patient A with a stretcher B, it is the case that triage assessment is complete for A

mark_triage_assessed_via_kiosk.description: mark triage assessed for a patient A via a registration kiosk B
preconditions: I can only mark triage assessed for a patient A via a registration kiosk B if it is the case that A is registered as a patient and triage is in progress for A and B is available
I can only mark triage assessed for a patient A via a registration kiosk B if it is not the case that triage assessment is complete for A
effects: Once I mark triage assessed for a patient A via a registration kiosk B, it is the case that triage assessment is complete for A and A has a priority flag
Once I mark triage assessed for a patient A via a registration kiosk B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

request_porter.description: request a porter C for a patient A assigned to a stretcher B
preconditions: I can only request a porter C for a patient A assigned to a stretcher B if it is the case that triage assessment is complete for A and triage is in progress for A and A is assigned to B and C is available
I can only request a porter C for a patient A assigned to a stretcher B if it is not the case that A is ready for care assignment
effects: Once I request a porter C for a patient A assigned to a stretcher B, it is the case that A is ready for care assignment
Once I request a porter C for a patient A assigned to a stretcher B, it is not the case anymore that A has a priority flag

mark_ready_for_care_after_room_assignmen.description: mark a patient A as ready for care after assignment to a treatment room B
preconditions: I can only mark a patient A as ready for care after assignment to a treatment room B if it is the case that triage is in progress for A and A has reserved treatment room B
I can only mark a patient A as ready for care after assignment to a treatment room B if it is not the case that A is ready for care assignment
effects: Once I mark a patient A as ready for care after assignment to a treatment room B, it is the case that A is ready for care assignment
Once I mark a patient A as ready for care after assignment to a treatment room B, it is not the case anymore that A has a priority flag

reserve_clinician.description: reserve a clinician B for a patient A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinician B for a patient A if it is the case that A is registered as a patient and B is available and B is compatible with A
effects: Once I reserve a clinician B for a patient A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a clinician B for a patient A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_clinician.description: release a clinician B from a patient A
preconditions: I can only release a clinician B from a patient A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a clinician B from a patient A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a clinician B from a patient A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_diagnostic_service.description: reserve a diagnostic service B for a patient A
preconditions: I can only reserve a diagnostic service B for a patient A if it is the case that A is registered as a patient and B is available and B is compatible with A
effects: Once I reserve a diagnostic service B for a patient A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a diagnostic service B for a patient A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_diagnostic_service.description: release a diagnostic service B from a patient A
preconditions: I can only release a diagnostic service B from a patient A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a diagnostic service B from a patient A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a diagnostic service B from a patient A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_specialty_service.description: reserve a specialty service B for a patient A
preconditions: I can only reserve a specialty service B for a patient A if it is the case that A is registered as a patient and B is available and B is compatible with A
effects: Once I reserve a specialty service B for a patient A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a specialty service B for a patient A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_specialty_service.description: release a specialty service B from a patient A
preconditions: I can only release a specialty service B from a patient A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a specialty service B from a patient A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a specialty service B from a patient A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_consultant.description: reserve a consultant B for a patient A
preconditions: I can only reserve a consultant B for a patient A if it is the case that A is registered as a patient and B is available for consultation and B is compatible with A
effects: Once I reserve a consultant B for a patient A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a consultant B for a patient A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for consultation

release_consultant.description: release a consultant B from a patient A
preconditions: I can only release a consultant B from a patient A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a consultant B from a patient A, it is the case that B is available for consultation
Once I release a consultant B from a patient A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

initiate_care_assignment.description: initiate care assignment for a patient A to a care area B with a clinician C and a diagnostic service D
preconditions: I can only initiate care assignment for a patient A to a care area B with a clinician C and a diagnostic service D if it is the case that triage is in progress for A and C is reserved for A and D is reserved for A and B is available for care and B is compatible with A for care
I can only initiate care assignment for a patient A to a care area B with a clinician C and a diagnostic service D if it is not the case that A is in treatment
effects: Once I initiate care assignment for a patient A to a care area B with a clinician C and a diagnostic service D, it is the case that A is assigned to the care area B and A is in treatment
Once I initiate care assignment for a patient A to a care area B with a clinician C and a diagnostic service D, it is not the case anymore that B is available for care

initiate_care_with_specialty_and_imaging.description: initiate care with a specialty service C and an imaging equipment D for a patient A in a care area B
preconditions: I can only initiate care with a specialty service C and an imaging equipment D for a patient A in a care area B if it is the case that triage is in progress for A and C is reserved for A and D is available for imaging and B is available for care and B is compatible with A for care and D is compatible with A
I can only initiate care with a specialty service C and an imaging equipment D for a patient A in a care area B if it is not the case that A is in treatment
effects: Once I initiate care with a specialty service C and an imaging equipment D for a patient A in a care area B, it is the case that A is assigned to the care area B and A is in treatment and escalation is required for A and A has a priority flag

Once I initiate care with a specialty service C and an imaging equipment D for a patient A in a care area B, it is not the case anymore that B is available for care and it is not the case anymore that D is available for imaging

clear_escalation_and_priority_flags.description: clear escalation and priority flags for a patient A with a clinician B and a diagnostic service C
preconditions: I can only clear escalation and priority flags for a patient A with a clinician B and a diagnostic service C if it is the case that A is in treatment and escalation is required for A and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A
effects: Once I clear escalation and priority flags for a patient A with a clinician B and a diagnostic service C, it is not the case anymore that escalation is required for A and it is not the case anymore that A has a priority flag

complete_clinical_checks.description: complete clinical checks for a patient A with a clinician B, a diagnostic service C, and a monitored bed D
preconditions: I can only complete clinical checks for a patient A with a clinician B, a diagnostic service C, and a monitored bed D if it is the case that A is ready for care assignment and A is in treatment and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A and D is compatible with A

I can only complete clinical checks for a patient A with a clinician B, a diagnostic service C, and a monitored bed D if it is not the case that A has a priority flag and it is not the case that safety checks are completed for A
effects: Once I complete clinical checks for a patient A with a clinician B, a diagnostic service C, and a monitored bed D, it is the case that safety checks are completed for A

complete_clinical_checks_with_specialty.description: complete clinical checks with specialty for a patient A using a specialty service B, a consultant C, and an observation bed D
preconditions: I can only complete clinical checks with specialty for a patient A using a specialty service B, a consultant C, and an observation bed D if it is the case that A is ready for care assignment and A is in treatment and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A and D is compatible with A
I can only complete clinical checks with specialty for a patient A using a specialty service B, a consultant C, and an observation bed D if it is not the case that safety checks are completed for A
effects: Once I complete clinical checks with specialty for a patient A using a specialty service B, a consultant C, and an observation bed D, it is the case that safety checks are completed for A and A has a priority flag

start_disposition_process.description: start disposition process for a patient A with a clinician B and a diagnostic service C
preconditions: I can only start disposition process for a patient A with a clinician B and a diagnostic service C if it is the case that safety checks are completed for A and A has a priority flag and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A
effects: Once I start disposition process for a patient A with a clinician B and a diagnostic service C, it is the case that A is ready for bed assignment

Once I start disposition process for a patient A with a clinician B and a diagnostic service C, it is not the case anymore that A has a priority flag and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for care assignment and it is not the case anymore that escalation is required for A

prepare_bed_with_porter.description: prepare bed for a patient A using a stretcher B with assistance from a porter C
preconditions: I can only prepare bed for a patient A using a stretcher B with assistance from a porter C if it is the case that A is ready for bed assignment and safety checks are completed for A and triage is in progress for A and A is assigned to B and C is available
I can only prepare bed for a patient A using a stretcher B with assistance from a porter C if it is not the case that A is ready for care assignment
effects: Once I prepare bed for a patient A using a stretcher B with assistance from a porter C, it is the case that A is ready for care assignment

mark_bed_ready.description: mark bed as ready for a patient A using a stretcher B
preconditions: I can only mark bed as ready for a patient A using a stretcher B if it is the case that safety checks are completed for A and A is ready for care assignment and A is assigned to B
I can only mark bed as ready for a patient A using a stretcher B if it is not the case that A has a priority flag and it is not the case that the bed is prepared for A
effects: Once I mark bed as ready for a patient A using a stretcher B, it is the case that the bed is prepared for A

mark_bed_ready_via_kiosk.description: mark bed as ready for a patient A using a registration kiosk B
preconditions: I can only mark bed as ready for a patient A using a registration kiosk B if it is the case that safety checks are completed for A and A is ready for care assignment and B is available
I can only mark bed as ready for a patient A using a registration kiosk B if it is not the case that A has a priority flag and it is not the case that the bed is prepared for A
effects: Once I mark bed as ready for a patient A using a registration kiosk B, it is the case that the bed is prepared for A
Once I mark bed as ready for a patient A using a registration kiosk B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_treatment_room.description: assign a patient A to a treatment room B
preconditions: I can only assign a patient A to a treatment room B if it is the case that the bed is prepared for A and B is available and A is compatible with the secondary treatment room B
effects: Once I assign a patient A to a treatment room B, it is the case that B is in use by A
Once I assign a patient A to a treatment room B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_treatment_room_using_existing_res.description: assign a pediatric patient A to a treatment room C using existing reservation with an adult patient B
preconditions: I can only assign a pediatric patient A to a treatment room C using existing reservation with an adult patient B if it is the case that A is registered as a patient and A is a pediatric patient and A is compatible with treatment room C and C is in use by B
I can only assign a pediatric patient A to a treatment room C using existing reservation with an adult patient B if it is not the case that A has reserved treatment room C
effects: Once I assign a pediatric patient A to a treatment room C using existing reservation with an adult patient B, it is the case that A has reserved treatment room C

mark_ready_for_disposition.description: mark a pediatric patient A as ready for disposition with a stretcher B and a porter C
preconditions: I can only mark a pediatric patient A as ready for disposition with a stretcher B and a porter C if it is the case that A is registered as a patient and A is a pediatric patient and A is ready for care assignment and the bed is prepared for A and A is assigned to B and C is available
I can only mark a pediatric patient A as ready for disposition with a stretcher B and a porter C if it is not the case that A is ready for disposition
effects: Once I mark a pediatric patient A as ready for disposition with a stretcher B and a porter C, it is the case that A is ready for disposition

finalize_disposition_for_adult.description: finalize disposition for an adult patient A
preconditions: I can only finalize disposition for an adult patient A if it is the case that A is an adult patient and A is registered as a patient and triage is in progress for A and A is in treatment and safety checks are completed for A and the bed is prepared for A and A is ready for care assignment
I can only finalize disposition for an adult patient A if it is not the case that the disposition is finalized for A
effects: Once I finalize disposition for an adult patient A, it is the case that the disposition is finalized for A

finalize_disposition_with_room.description: finalize disposition for a pediatric patient A with a treatment room B
preconditions: I can only finalize disposition for a pediatric patient A with a treatment room B if it is the case that A is a pediatric patient and A is registered as a patient and triage is in progress for A and A is in treatment and safety checks are completed for A and the bed is prepared for A and A is ready for care assignment and A has reserved treatment room B
I can only finalize disposition for a pediatric patient A with a treatment room B if it is not the case that the disposition is finalized for A
effects: Once I finalize disposition for a pediatric patient A with a treatment room B, it is the case that the disposition is finalized for A

finalize_disposition_with_ready_flag.description: finalize disposition for a pediatric patient A with ready flag
preconditions: I can only finalize disposition for a pediatric patient A with ready flag if it is the case that A is a pediatric patient and A is registered as a patient and triage is in progress for A and A is in treatment and safety checks are completed for A and the bed is prepared for A and A is ready for care assignment and A is ready for disposition
I can only finalize disposition for a pediatric patient A with ready flag if it is not the case that the disposition is finalized for A
effects: Once I finalize disposition for a pediatric patient A with ready flag, it is the case that the disposition is finalized for A

action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_care_assignment: initiate care assignment for a patient {?patient} to a care area {?care_area} with a clinician {?clinician} and a diagnostic service {?diagnostic_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_care_with_specialty_and_imaging: initiate care with a specialty service {?specialty_service} and an imaging equipment {?imaging_equipment} for a patient {?patient} in a care area {?care_area}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_escalation_and_priority_flags: clear escalation and priority flags for a patient {?patient} with a clinician {?clinician} and a diagnostic service {?diagnostic_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_clinical_checks: complete clinical checks for a patient {?patient} with a clinician {?clinician}, a diagnostic service {?diagnostic_service}, and a monitored bed {?monitored_bed}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_clinical_checks_with_specialty: complete clinical checks with specialty for a patient {?patient} using a specialty service {?specialty_service}, a consultant {?consultant}, and an observation bed {?observation_bed}
action_nl_templates_indef.start_disposition_process: start disposition process for a patient {?patient} with a clinician {?clinician} and a diagnostic service {?diagnostic_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.prepare_bed_with_porter: prepare bed for a patient {?patient} using a stretcher {?stretcher} with assistance from a porter {?porter}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_bed_ready: mark bed as ready for a patient {?patient} using a stretcher {?stretcher}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_bed_ready_via_kiosk: mark bed as ready for a patient {?patient} using a registration kiosk {?registration_kiosk}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_treatment_room: assign a patient {?patient} to a treatment room {?treatment_room}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_treatment_room_using_existing_res: assign a pediatric patient {?pediatric_patient} to a treatment room {?treatment_room} using existing reservation with an adult patient {?adult_patient}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_ready_for_disposition: mark a pediatric patient {?patient} as ready for disposition with a stretcher {?stretcher} and a porter {?porter}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_disposition_for_adult: finalize disposition for an adult patient {?patient}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_disposition_with_room: finalize disposition for a pediatric patient {?patient} with a treatment room {?treatment_room}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_disposition_with_ready_flag: finalize disposition for a pediatric patient {?patient} with ready flag

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a entity is also a object

Everything that is a patient or a triage staff or a care area or a diagnostic service or a clinician or a specialty service or a stretcher or a registration kiosk or a treatment room or a porter or a imaging equipment or a consultant or a bed is also a entity
Everything that is a monitored bed or a observation bed is also a bed
Everything that is a adult patient or a pediatric patient is also a patient
